subject: Extend scripts/run_eval.py with CI assertions and failure taxonomy
description: Add --assert flags (key==value, key>=value) to gate CI on eval metrics, enforce default thresholds (citation_required_pass_rate==1.0, locator_resolve_pass_rate==1.0, abstention_f1>=0.95), print failure taxonomy counts (missing_citations, untrusted_sources, citation_verification_failed), exit 0/1 accordingly, and write evidence file .sisyphus/evidence/task-25-eval-thresholds.txt.
activeForm: Implement --assert parsing and metric comparisons; emit taxonomy; ensure correct exit codes; update evidence file; run lsp diagnostics and python test run.
